title: helia princeps
intro: Helia princeps, also known as the Heliotrope or Turner's heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of alkaloids like heliotropine. The health benefits of Helia princeps include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its antiseptic properties which can aid in wound healing. Helia princeps can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.
